evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Deliver, and enable others to build, well-defined, transformed, tested, documented, and code-reviewed data sets.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Testing, documentation, code review, and reliability language dominate the responsibilities ("tested", "documented", "code-reviewed", "reliable, consistent results") with no velocity/speed-of-shipping phrases present.
evidence.domain_risk: Over 5 million homeowners are subscribers, tracking their property values and providing a pipeline of movers for Zoopla's customers (estate agents and housebuilders).
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: A consumer property marketplace where errors affect business decisions and customer trust at scale but carry no explicit regulatory, audit, or financial-reporting consequence, so moderate applies.
evidence.data_team_maturity: you'll own and develop the data modelling infrastructure, architecture and pipelines powering a wide range of data initiatives and data products
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: A dedicated Data Analytics team with an existing transformation layer, orchestration, and multiple consuming teams that need unification signals an established, specialised data function operating at scale.
evidence.jd_authorship: Has experience setting up & developing dbt architecture using CI/CD practices (essential) ... Has experience working with Databricks and AWS (Glue, Lambda, Step Functions)
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Requirements name precise tools and practices (dbt CI/CD, Databricks, AWS Glue/Lambda/Step Functions, Tableau/PowerBI) and responsibilities describe concrete day-to-day work (troubleshooting pipeline errors, code review) that only someone who understands the role could write.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Due to the high quality of this data and the associated documentation, business users are able to self-serve, analyse, and build products and services upon it
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role's primary audience is internal business users and other teams consuming a self-serve transformation layer, rather than a specific commercial, product, or finance function.
evidence.autonomy_level: Own the analytics engineering workflow and architecture for the data modelling layer at the heart of the business.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: "Own" and "architecture" framing, combined with proactively seeking optimisation opportunities and unifying usage across teams, signals the role sets direction for the transformation layer rather than executing scoped tickets.
evidence.ai_role: Is comfortable harnessing AI workflows to expedite development in a scalable, sustainable way (essential)
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The requirement is explicitly that the candidate uses AI workflows to accelerate their own development work, making the AI the candidate's tool rather than downstream infrastructure consumer.
evidence.testing_framing: Deliver, and enable others to build, well-defined, transformed, tested, documented, and code-reviewed data sets.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing and code review are named as owned deliverables the candidate both performs and enables others to do, an ownership framing rather than a listed tool.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Due to the high quality of this data and the associated documentation, business users are able to self-serve, analyse, and build products and services upon it, getting reliable, consistent results.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Reliability, consistency, testing, and documentation language recurs across nearly every responsibility bullet and is central to the role's framing, indicating trust in the data pipeline is the dominant concern.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Proactively seek automation and optimisation opportunities to constantly improve and develop the transformation layer, and unify its usage across multiple teams.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The dominant verb signal is improving, troubleshooting, and unifying an existing transformation layer and orchestration system rather than building new infrastructure from scratch, so fix_scale applies.
evidence.work_arrangement: You'll have the opportunity to work remotely (at home) for two days per week with Mondays and Thursdays as all-Zoopla days in the office together plus a third in-office day of your choosing.
evidence.loss_aversion: Due to the high quality of this data and the associated documentation, business users are able to self-serve, analyse, and build products and services upon it, getting reliable, consistent results — reliability and trust in the data layer anchor the role's central value proposition throughout the JD.
